evals.prompt: Convert the legacy Banishment script from discord-animations/completed/Banishment_Final(1).js into the new modular format. Apply all styling rules.
evals.expected_output: A modular Javascript file exporting a 'banishment' object with 'create', 'play', 'stop' functions matching the references/template_active_effect.js pattern.

evals.prompt: Convert the legacy Misty Step script from discord-animations/completed/Misty_Step.js into the new modular format. Apply all styling rules.
